summary: HR Module V4 Features Testing Complete - All restored features verified and working: Salary structure with deductions, Quick Leave Actions, Monthly Leave Summary, and Document Management
passed_tests: CEO login (ceo@wisedrive.com / password123)
HR Manager login (hr@wisedrive.com / password123)
GET /api/hr/employees - Employee list retrieval
POST /api/hr/employees/{id}/salary - Save salary with earnings (Basic, HRA, Variable Pay, Conveyance, Medical, Special Allowance)
POST /api/hr/employees/{id}/salary - Save salary with deductions (PF Employee, Professional Tax, Income Tax, Other Deductions)
Gross and Net salary calculation verified (Gross: 81500, Net: 69800 with test data)
GET /api/hr/employees/{id}/salary - Retrieve salary structure
POST /api/hr/employees/{id}/attendance - Mark today as leave (status: on_leave)
POST /api/hr/employees/{id}/attendance - Mark tomorrow as leave
POST /api/hr/employees/{id}/attendance - Mark as present
POST /api/hr/employees/{id}/attendance - Mark as half day
GET /api/hr/employees/{id}/attendance - Get attendance records with summary
GET /api/hr/employees/{id}/leave-summary - Monthly leave summary for current year (12 months breakdown)
GET /api/hr/employees/{id}/leave-summary - Leave summary for different year (2025)
POST /api/hr/employees/{id}/documents - Add Aadhar document
POST /api/hr/employees/{id}/documents - Add PAN document
POST /api/hr/employees/{id}/documents - Add Offer Letter document
GET /api/hr/employees/{id}/documents - Get employee documents
DELETE /api/hr/employees/{id}/documents/{doc_id} - Delete document
HR Manager authorization - Can access employees, save salary, mark attendance, add documents
UI: Employee modal opens correctly with Details, Salary, Attendance, Documents tabs
UI: Salary tab shows Earnings section (Basic Salary, HRA, Variable Pay, Conveyance, Medical Allowance, Special Allowance)
UI: Salary tab shows Deductions section (PF Employee, Professional Tax, Income Tax TDS, Other Deductions)
UI: Salary tab shows Gross Salary and Net Salary (Take Home) calculations
UI: Attendance tab shows Quick Leave Actions (Mark Today as Leave, Mark Tomorrow as Leave buttons)
UI: Attendance tab shows Monthly Leave Summary with year selector and summary cards (Present Days, Leaves Taken, Half Days, Working Days)
UI: Documents tab shows Upload New Document form (Document Type dropdown, Document Name input, Document URL input, Add Document button)
UI: Documents tab shows document list with View and Delete actions
UI: Mark Today as Leave button works - shows success toast 'Today marked as leave'
UI: Add Document works - shows success toast 'Document added' and document appears in list
seed_data_creation: Test documents created during testing (TEST_Aadhar Card, TEST_PAN Card, TEST_Offer Letter 2024, TEST_HR Added Doc, UI_Test_Passport_Doc)
context_for_next_testing_agent: HR Module V4 features fully tested and working. Key features verified: 1) Salary tab with full Earnings section (Basic, HRA, Variable Pay, Conveyance, Medical, Special Allowance) and Deductions section (PF Employee, Professional Tax, Income Tax TDS, Other Deductions) with Gross/Net salary calculation, 2) Attendance tab with Quick Leave Actions (Mark Today/Tomorrow as Leave buttons) and Monthly Leave Summary with year selector showing Present Days, Leaves Taken, Half Days, Working Days, 3) Documents tab with upload form (Document Type dropdown, Name, URL) and document list with View/Delete actions. All backend APIs working: POST /api/hr/employees/{id}/salary, POST /api/hr/employees/{id}/attendance, GET /api/hr/employees/{id}/leave-summary, POST/GET/DELETE /api/hr/employees/{id}/documents.
